name: Soft Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray cookie sheet with oil spray.
3. In a bowl, cream margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg whites, almond extract, and food coloring; mix well and set aside.
5. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into the creamed mixture.
6. Mix ingredients only until blended; do not overmix to avoid toughness.
7. Spoon dough onto prepared cookie sheet as 3/4-inch balls.
8. Top each ball with a toasted almond.
9. Bake for 12 minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 BREAD EXCHANGE CHO: Og; FAT: 1g; CAL: 43;
